title: Selection Sort vs Bubble Sort Algorithm Flow
description: A comparative flowchart illustrating the step-by-step logic and key differences between Selection Sort and Bubble Sort algorithms.
elements: Find Minimum (Selection Sort) | Compare Adjacent Elements (Bubble Sort)
relationships: Selection Sort path branches to 'Find Minimum' element, then 'Swap Elements'
Bubble Sort path branches to 'Compare Adjacent Elements', then conditionally to 'Swap Elements'
Both algorithms use nested loops and converge on 'Sorted Array'
